title: hieracium pichleri subsp. ochridanum
intro: Hieracium pichleri subsp. ochridanum, also known as the hawkweed, is a rare and endemic plant species found in North Macedonia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Hieracium pichleri subsp. ochridanum include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its antiseptic properties that can aid in the prevention of infection. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has also been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects.
